messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个贪食蛇游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个贪食蛇游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>贪食蛇游戏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        // Canvas 设置
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏常量
        const GRID_SIZE = 20;
        const GAME_AREA_X = 20;
        const GAME_AREA_Y = 60;
        const GAME_AREA_WIDTH = 320; // 16 格子
        const GAME_AREA_HEIGHT = 560; // 28 格子
        const COLS = GAME_AREA_WIDTH / GRID_SIZE;
        const ROWS = GAME_AREA_HEIGHT / GRID_SIZE;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, paused, gameover
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('snakeHighScore') || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;
        let snake = [];
        let food = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        let direction = { x: 1, y: 0 }; // 初始向右
        let nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
        let moveTimer = 0;
        const MOVE_INTERVAL = 150; // 毫秒，控制蛇移动速度

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            // 初始化蛇
            snake = [
                { x: 5, y: 10 },
                { x: 4, y: 10 },
                { x: 3, y: 10 }
            ];
            direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            score = 0;
            moveTimer = 0;
            spawnFood();
        }

        // 生成食物
        function spawnFood() {
            let valid = false;
            while (!valid) {
                food.x = Math.floor(Math.random() * COLS);
                food.y = Math.floor(Math.random() * ROWS);
                // 确保食物不在蛇身上
                valid = !snake.some(segment => segment.x === food.x && segment.y === food.y);
            }
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;
            switch (key) {
                case 'ArrowUp':
                case 'w':
                case 'W':
                    if (direction.y !== 1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: -1 };
                    break;
                case 'ArrowDown':
                case 's':
                case 'S':
                    if (direction.y !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: 1 };
                    break;
                case 'ArrowLeft':
                case 'a':
                case 'A':
                    if (direction.x !== 1) nextDirection = { x: -1, y: 0 };
                    break;
                case 'ArrowRight':
                case 'd':
                case 'D':
                    if (direction.x !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
                    break;
                case ' ':
                    if (gameState === 'menu' || gameState === 'gameover') {
                        gameState = 'playing';
                        initGame();
                    } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                        gameState = 'paused';
                    } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                        gameState = 'playing';
                    }
                    break;
                case 'Escape':
                    if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused') {
                        gameState = 'menu';
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            moveTimer += deltaTime;
            if (moveTimer >= MOVE_INTERVAL) {
                moveTimer = 0;
                direction = nextDirection;
                // 移动蛇
                const head = { x: snake[0].x + direction.x, y: snake[0].y + direction.y };

                // 碰撞检测：墙壁
                if (head.x < 0 || head.x >= COLS || head.y < 0 || head.y >= ROWS) {
                    gameOver();
                    return;
                }

                // 碰撞检测：自身
                if (snake.some(segment => segment.x === head.x && segment.y === head.y)) {
                    gameOver();
                    return;
                }

                snake.unshift(head); // 添加新头部

                // 检查是否吃到食物
                if (head.x === food.x && head.y === food.y) {
                    score += 10;
                    spawnFood();
                } else {
                    snake.pop(); // 移除尾部
                }
            }
        }

        // 游戏结束
        function gameOver() {
            gameState = 'gameover';
            if (score > highScore) {
                highScore = score;
                localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
            }
        }

        // 渲染游戏
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制游戏区域背景
            ctx.fillStyle = '#16213e';
            ctx.fillRect(GAME_AREA_X, GAME_AREA_Y, GAME_AREA_WIDTH, GAME_AREA_HEIGHT);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.strokeRect(GAME_AREA_X, GAME_AREA_Y, GAME_AREA_WIDTH, GAME_AREA_HEIGHT);

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 50, 30); // 青色数值
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 50);

            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused') {
                drawGame();
                if (gameState === 'paused') {
                    drawPauseScreen();
                }
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawGame();
                drawGameOverScreen();
            }
        }

        // 绘制菜单
        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(GAME_AREA_X, GAME_AREA_Y, GAME_AREA_WIDTH, GAME_AREA_HEIGHT);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('贪食蛇游戏', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 100);
            ctx.font = '20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格键开始', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 200);
            ctx.fillText('使用方向键或WASD控制', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 250);
            ctx.fillText('按ESC返回菜单', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 300);
        }

        // 绘制游戏元素
        function drawGame() {
            // 绘制食物
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.fillRect(
                GAME_AREA_X + food.x * GRID_SIZE,
                GAME_AREA_Y + food.y * GRID_SIZE,
                GRID_SIZE,
                GRID_SIZE
            );

            // 绘制蛇
            snake.forEach((segment, index) => {
                ctx.fillStyle = index === 0 ? '#4fd1c5' : '#45b7aa'; // 头部颜色不同
                ctx.fillRect(
                    GAME_AREA_X + segment.x * GRID_SIZE,
                    GAME_AREA_Y + segment.y * GRID_SIZE,
                    GRID_SIZE,
                    GRID_SIZE
                );
                // 添加边框以增强视觉效果
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#1a1a2e';
                ctx.lineWidth = 1;
                ctx.strokeRect(
                    GAME_AREA_X + segment.x * GRID_SIZE,
                    GAME_AREA_Y + segment.y * GRID_SIZE,
                    GRID_SIZE,
                    GRID_SIZE
                );
            });
        }

        // 绘制暂停屏幕
        function drawPauseScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(GAME_AREA_X, GAME_AREA_Y, GAME_AREA_WIDTH, GAME_AREA_HEIGHT);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 200);
            ctx.font = '20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格键继续', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 250);
        }

        // 绘制游戏结束屏幕
        function drawGameOverScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(GAME_AREA_X, GAME_AREA_Y, GAME_AREA_WIDTH, GAME_AREA_HEIGHT);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 150);
            ctx.font = '20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 200);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 250);
            ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, GAME_AREA_Y + 300);
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });

        // 启动游戏
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
